learned_core_only.removed_module: all deterministic guards, safety guards, and inference logit shaping
learned_core_only.paper_contribution: isolates the loaded learned policy network without policy-side guard or shaping layers

no_guard.paper_contribution: keeps learned policy and inference bias but removes continuity/cache/prefetch/backhaul guard interventions

cache_warm_guard_only.removed_module: all safety guards except cache warm-start guard
cache_warm_guard_only.paper_contribution: tests whether the cache warm-start guard alone explains safety or reward changes

prefetch_admission_guard_only.removed_module: all safety guards except predictive prefetch admission guard
prefetch_admission_guard_only.paper_contribution: tests whether low-confidence prefetch deferral alone explains safety or reward changes

backhaul_guard_only.removed_module: all safety guards except backhaul guard
backhaul_guard_only.paper_contribution: tests whether the backhaul guard alone explains traffic-cost changes

all_guards.paper_contribution: full loaded v8/v9 inference stack with learned policy, calibrated surrogate features, deterministic smoothing, and safety guards
